heading: Warialda Rail vs Warkworth — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Warialda Rail, New South Wales and Warkworth, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Warialda Rail has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Warkworth (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Warialda Rail or Warkworth safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Warialda Rail has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Warkworth scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Warialda Rail scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Warkworth scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Warialda Rail or Warkworth?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Warialda Rail has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
